/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/emcc -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS='["_lo3_run", "_lo3_version"]' -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/lo3.dir/src/control-flow.c.o" CMakeFiles/lo3.dir/src/execute.c.o CMakeFiles/lo3.dir/src/global.c.o CMakeFiles/lo3.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/lo3.dir/src/parsing.c.o CMakeFiles/lo3.dir/src/var.c.o CMakeFiles/lo3.dir/src/warnings.c.o CMakeFiles/lo3.dir/src/wasm_exports.c.o -o /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/lo3-core/bin/lo3.js  -ldl
